series_metadata.series_description: Files concerning fleet vehicles owned by the Ohio Organized Crime Investigations Commission (OOCIC). Records include, but are not limited to, service records, operation maintenance reports of vehicle, warranties and guaranty statements, operating manual, accident reports, repair records, and salvage information.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: vehicle is salvaged or sold. ; Paper: vehicle is salvaged or sold, unless scanned and saved electronically
